sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id UInt32, start_date Date, interval_value IntervalMinute) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_intervals (id, start_date, interval_value) VALUES (1, toDate('2024-06-15'), toIntervalMinute(15));
UPDATE test_intervals SET interval_value = toIntervalMinute(30) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT start_date, start_date + interval_value AS end_date FROM test_intervals;
SELECT id, toIntervalMinute(45) + toIntervalMinute(15) AS total_interval FROM test_intervals;
